title: ESCC install-components manifest
description: manifests/install-components.json — finer-grained install units grouped by family (ESCC families: persona:*, capability:*, methodology:*), each expanding to one or more modules. version may be null/absent (the loader defaults it).

family.description: component family, e.g. persona | capability | methodology | skill | agent

synthetic.description: true for components generated at load time (e.g. per-skill surfaces)
